# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

# Source on Helm
apiVersion: helm.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v2beta1
kind: Source
metadata:
  name: example-app
spec:
  interval: 10m
  url: https://github.com/example/chart.git

# Application deployment (deployment.yaml)
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "example.fullname" . }}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: example
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: example
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: example
          image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 80

# Chart configuration (values.yaml)
image:
  repository: example/app-image
  tag: latest

# Values for deployment (requirements.yaml)
dependencies:
  - name: stable/coredns
    version: ^1.8.0
